slide2_subtitle: To relieve stress and clear the mind.
slide3_subtitle: Botanical supplements designed to harmonise your body.
story_p1: We know that wellness is not about a miracle solution. Every body is different, every rhythm too.
story_p2: That's why NUKU was designed to integrate simply into daily life, with clear formulas, carefully selected ingredients, and an honest approach to wellbeing.
story_p3: No excessive promises. Just supplements designed to support balance, day after day.
reviews_title: They say it better than us
